creator: davidc@sentex.net
text:
This patch worked for me.
PHP 5.2.12
Apache/2.0.63
FreeBSD 6.4-STABLE

The function throwing the error was imagecreatefrompng
The error was
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/php/20060613/gd.so: Undefined 
symbol "png_check_sig"

--
